Western Digital just named the 2 biggest storage challenges of the AI era   Scaling capacity to keep up with exponential data growth   Controlling total cost of ownership (TCO) The answer? A tiered memory stack: SRAM → HBM → DRAM → NAND/SSD.

Micron's (  $MU  ) surge is just a teaser. TrendForce previously projected Agentic AI to spark a mega-cycle, pushing memory to a $1.28T market by 2027!   The Shift:  Agentic AI loops spike DRAM demand  HBM capacity squeeze locks in supplier pricing power.  #AI #Tech

Micron ($MU) rebounds from its recent dip, posting a record Q3 rev of $41.5B (84.9% margin) for a 15% AH jump.   The driver? Diversified AI growth:   HBM4 (Compute)   Gen6 SSD (Storage)   LPDDR5X (Edge)  Strong Q4 outlook sets guidance at $50B!   #AI #Micron #Tech

3/ The tiered playbook, each layer doing one job well:  SRAM — on-chip, fastest  HBM — in-package  DRAM — on-board  NAND / SSD — external, highest capacity  Speed, capacity & cost, balanced across the stack.

top_tweets.text: AI 電源半導體報告 1. 市場規模與成長預測 - 2025 年：約 27 億美元 - 2028 年：約 160 億美元 - 三年 CAGR ≈ 82%  2. 主要成長驅動因素 - 架構轉型：資料中心全面轉向 800V HVDC 高壓直流架構，大幅提升每 kW 半導體含量價值。 - 元件替換：以固態半導體全面取代傳統機電元件（從電網到機架）。 ‧
keywords: 元件替換 以固態半導體全面取代傳統機電元件

top_tweets.text: 玻璃基板突破AI晶片封裝瓶頸  隨著AI晶片尺寸持續放大，傳統有機基板因翹曲（warpage）問題導致良率下降。具備熱膨脹係數（CTE）接近矽（3-9 ppm/°C）、優異介電性能（低Dk/Df）與極致平整表面的玻璃基板，成為下一代先進封裝關鍵材料，可作為玻璃核心基板或玻璃中介層使用。
